-- SQL to create tests/fixtures/tiny.db
-- Run: sqlite3 tests/fixtures/tiny.db < tests/fixtures/tiny.sql.txt

CREATE TABLE users (id INT, name TEXT, sex TEXT, rugby TEXT);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'alice', 'F', 'France');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, 'bob', 'M', 'England');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (3, 'bert', 'M', 'Australia');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (4, 'jude', 'M', 'USA');
